audit_status.source_base: Greek Romans text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for Phoebe, women leaders, Junia, house assemblies, warning, greetings, doxology. Preserve women's ministry visibility.

verses.restored: I commend to you Phoebe our sister, who is also servant/deacon of the assembly in Cenchreae,
so that you may receive her in the Lord worthily of the holy ones and stand by her in whatever matter she may need from you; for she also became a patron/protector of many, and of me myself.
Greet Prisca and Aquila, my coworkers in Messiah Jesus,
who for my life/soul risked their own necks, to whom not only I give thanks but also all the assemblies of the nations.
Greet also the assembly in their house. Greet my beloved Epaenetus, who is firstfruit of Asia for Messiah.
Greet Mary, who labored much for you.
Greet Andronicus and Junia, my kin and fellow prisoners, who are notable among the apostles and were in Messiah before me.
Greet Ampliatus, my beloved in the Lord.
Greet Urbanus, our coworker in Messiah, and my beloved Stachys.
Greet Apelles, approved in Messiah. Greet those from the household of Aristobulus.
Greet Herodion, my kin. Greet those from the household of Narcissus who are in the Lord.
Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, those laboring in the Lord. Greet beloved Persis, who labored much in the Lord.
Greet Rufus, chosen in the Lord, and his mother and mine.
Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the siblings with them.
Greet Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the holy ones with them.
Greet one another with a holy kiss. All the assemblies of Messiah greet you.
I urge you, siblings, to watch those making divisions and stumbling blocks contrary to the teaching that you learned, and turn away from them.
For such ones do not serve our Lord Messiah but their own belly, and through smooth speech and blessing-talk deceive the hearts of the innocent.
For your obedience has reached all. Therefore I rejoice over you, but I want you wise toward the good and unmixed toward the harmful.
The Divine of peace will crush the Accuser under your feet swiftly. The grace of our Lord Jesus be with you.
Timothy, my coworker, greets you, and Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my kin.
I, Tertius, the one writing down the letter, greet you in the Lord.
Gaius, host of me and of the whole assembly, greets you. Erastus, the city treasurer, greets you, and Quartus the sibling.
[Some later manuscripts include: The grace of our Lord Jesus Messiah be with you all. Amen.]
Now to the One able to strengthen you according to my good news and the proclamation of Jesus Messiah, according to revelation of mystery kept silent for age-long times,
but now manifested, and through prophetic Scriptures according to command of the age-long Divine, made known to all nations for obedience of trust,
to the only wise Divine, through Jesus Messiah, be glory into the ages. Amen.

translation_notes: Phoebe is rendered servant/deacon and patron/protector to preserve her official/ministry and benefactor roles.
Junia is preserved as a woman notable among the apostles, following the straightforward Greek name and early reception.
Romans 16 reveals a network of women and men coworkers, house assemblies, kin, prisoners, patrons, and scribes.
